title: Gurkan's Lib
body:
# Gurkan's Lib

This is a library used for my other mods, and doesn't really add any new features.

## Developers
If you really want to use this for your own mods (you probably shouldn't), you can read the code on GitHub and see how it works. I might document it later.

## License

This mod is licensed with the GPL-3.0 license.

You're free to include this in your own modpacks, but please provide credit to us, and please do not reupload this mod to other mod hosting sites.
